name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Heavy cream; whip with a little sugar to sweeten
1 cup Chocolate sauce in squeeze bottle
recipeInstructions:
1. Using an electric mixer, beat the cream cheese and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add the peanut butter, milk, and chopped peanuts to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Fold half of the whipped cream into the peanut butter/cheese mixture. Set aside the remaining whipped cream in the refrigerator.
4. Spoon the filling into the prepared pie shell.
5. Refrigerate the pie for 1 hour or until set.
6. Place a piece of the pie in the center of a plate.
7. Garnish with whipped cream, chopped peanuts, chocolate shavings, chocolate sauce, powdered sugar, and mint sprigs.
